definitions.name: los_days
definitions.business_description: The number of days between Hospital admission date and time and Hospital discharge date and time

definitions.name: los_category
definitions.business_description:
Classified as:
  - 'Long' when los_days is greater than 7
  - 'Short' otherwise
definitions.technical_expression: CASE WHEN los_days > 7 THEN 'Long' ELSE 'Short' END
